text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Tachyon, thank you again for the<n>supplements!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Ah, right. Well? Did they help your eye<n>fatigue?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Yes! By the next day, I was able to read<n>the book
I'd been dying to finish.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Oh? Any other changes? Any muscle<n>spasms,
increased blood circulation, or<n>fits of ecstasy?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
No, not at all! I actually felt more<n>relaxed than
normal. It was like all my<n>stress just disappeared...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Just what is in those supplements? I'm<n>sure it took
a long time to come up with<n>the current formula.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Ah, no, those supplements were<n>created for
a previous body modification<n>experiment of mine,
so—

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Training is already so stressful on its<n>own. I can't
believe you're also studying<n>medicine on the side!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Do you have any tips for efficient<n>studying? I'd
love to hear them if you<n>do!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Oh... What an intriguing response. Heh...<n>You're
quite the dangerous one, if I do<n>say so myself.
